name: source-sleuth
description: Source Sleuth — Unit 8 Texas History game (TEKS 7.20A, 7.20D, 7.20E, 7.20F). Play a student historian solving "The Case of the Gonzales Cannon" — six sources, six tests, one verdict (solo, one class-wide group) — over a server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center reporting one class-wide accuracy group.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
